---
title: "Sarah Yao"
about:
  template: jolla
  image: image.jpg
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/yaosarah2005
---

Hi, I’m Sarah Yao, an undergraduate student at Colgate University. I'm interested in data analysis, economics, and statistics.

## Education

Colgate University ｜ Aug 2023 - May 2027 | B.A. in Economics | Minor in Applied Mathematics
